title: platytheca galioides var. pubescens
intro: Platytheca galioides var. pubescens, a variety of the Platytheca galioides plant, is a shrub-like member of the family Alseuosmiaceae found in the eastern parts of Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Australian Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Platytheca galioides var. pubescens can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a tincture or salve.
